word: H249 - אֶזְרָח - ʼezrâch - ez-rawkh' - Bay tree

sections.paragraph:
Original: אזרח

Transliteration: 'ezrâch

Phonetic: ez-rawkh'

BDB Definition:

  1. a native (one rising from the soil)
    1. of man, native Israelites
    2. of tree, native (to Israel)

Origin: from H2224 (in the sense of springing up)

TWOT entry: 580b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
